_comment: Dogfood: this repo uses the same Stop-hook auto-sync that harness-init ships to new projects (v0.9.0).

hooks._doc_sync_hook: Auto-runs harness-sync at session end so .harness/ edits flow to CLAUDE.md + .github/copilot-instructions.md without manual sync. On macOS/Linux without pwsh, change to: bash scripts/harness-sync.sh
